query: add a HEALTHCHECK instruction with --interval=30s and --timeout=3s that runs `curl -fs http://localhost:3000/health || exit 1`. Put it after the EXPOSE line.
check: grep -qE '^HEALTHCHECK' $FILE && grep -qE 'interval=30s' $FILE && grep -qE 'timeout=3s' $FILE && grep -qE 'curl' $FILE && grep -qE 'localhost:3000/health' $FILE && awk '/^EXPOSE\b/{e=NR} /^HEALTHCHECK\b/{h=NR} END{exit !(h > e)}' $FILE

query: convert this to a multi-stage build. First stage `FROM node:20-alpine AS builder` copies package files, runs npm ci and npm run build. Second stage `FROM node:20-alpine` copies only /app/dist and /app/node_modules from builder, sets NODE_ENV=production, EXPOSE 3000, CMD ["node","dist/server.js"].
